qa_pairs.question: Which user accounts have the name Roxi?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
WHERE useracct.name = 'Roxi'

qa_pairs.question: Which user accounts have given a review with a rating of exactly 10?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE review.rating = 10
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which useracct entities having at least one related review record (linked on useracct.u_id = review.u_id) with rating equal to '10'?

qa_pairs.question: Which user accounts belong to Mark and have reviews with a rank of at most 7?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Mark' AND review.rank <= 7
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which useracct entities with name equal to 'Mark', having at least one related review record (linked on useracct.u_id = review.u_id) with rank at most '7'?
